Live Activity

What's happening right now on Inter-Mission

Expertise Tracks

Find specialists across every area of Post Office operations

🏪

Counter Operations

Holiday cover, daily branch running, customer service, cash handling

💰

Financial Services

Banking, bill payments, MoneyGram, foreign exchange, savings, ISAs

📋

Compliance & Audit

Audit preparation, compliance checks, cash management, loss prevention

🎓

Training & Development

New staff training, system training, Horizon, Paystation, refresher courses

📊

Management & Strategy

Branch management, multi-site operations, performance improvement, P&L

🛒

Retail & Commercial

Retail setup, EPOS configuration, stock management, merchandising

🔧

Setup & Transitions

New branch opening, refit management, TUPE, PO Ltd applications

💼

Advisory & Consulting

Business planning, due diligence, acquisition support, franchise guidance

What People Are Saying

“I earned £3,200 in my first month on Inter-Mission. The platform connected me with branches that needed exactly my skill set.”

— Experienced Area Manager, North West

Ready to Get Started?

Join the network of Post Office professionals. Whether you're looking for work or need help, Inter-Mission connects you instantly.

Join the Network Browse Assignments

Inter-Mission is a marketplace operated by Firstclass Managerial Ltd (FCM Intelligence). We connect Post Office professionals with branch operators. FCM Intelligence is not an employment agency, employer, or contractor. All arrangements are made directly between parties. FCM Intelligence accepts no liability for the quality of work performed, financial losses, employment disputes, or any other matters arising from connections made through this platform. All users are responsible for their own tax, insurance, and legal obligations. By using Inter-Mission you agree to these terms.

FCM Intelligence|Contact|support@fcmgt.co.uk
